mapper.sql: select token_id, user_id, token_value, expired_at, last_access_time, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from mc_user_token
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.update: update mc_user_token set status = '1', update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'
